name: coTfsSDOGetBlockSize
title: coTfsSDOGetBlockSize
description: The function returns the block size of the last Initiate SDO Block Download or Download SDO Block Segment Response message.
With a return value 0, the message is not detected or awaited. The block size can only be read out once after each individual block
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
